# Hybrid Design System — Generated by Ditto

> Blended from 3 inspirations
> Generated on April 9, 2026

## Inspirations
- [Slack | Piattaforma di lavoro basata sull'IA e strumenti di produttività](https://slack.com) — weight: 40%
- [Gestisci il lavoro, i progetti e le attività del tuo team online • Asana • Asana](https://asana.com/it) — weight: 30%
- [Linear – The system for product development](https://linear.app/) — weight: 30%

## Mood Profile
- **Tono**: Bilanciato (+0.2)
- **Formalità**: Bilanciato (+0.3)
- **Energia**: Calmo (-0.3)
- **Temperatura**: Freddo (+0.6)
- **Densità**: Denso (+0.5)
- **Forma**: Bilanciato (-0.1)
- **Profondità**: Bilanciato (+0.1)
- **Palette**: Bilanciato (-0.0)
- **Tipografia**: Minimale (+0.5)
- **Movimento**: Bilanciato (-0.2)

## Font Setup

### Fonts Used
- **Heading**: `Salesforce-Sans`
- **Body**: `Salesforce-Avant-Garde`
- **Mono**: `ui-monospace`

### CSS Custom Properties
```css
:root {
  --font-heading: 'Salesforce-Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-body: 'Salesforce-Avant-Garde', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'ui-monospace', ui-monospace, monospace;
  --font-weight-heading: 300;
  --font-weight-body: 400;
}
```

## Color Palette & Roles

### Primary
- **Primary** (`#324d29`): CTAs, interactive elements, brand moments
- **Secondary** (`#89155f`): Supporting accents
- **Accent** (`#3b3b71`): Decorative highlights

### Surfaces
- **Background** (`#000000`): Page background
- **Surface** (`#696969`): Cards, elevated elements

### Text
- **Primary** (`#ffffff`): Headings, strong labels
- **Secondary** (`#d2cfd9`): Body text, descriptions
- **Muted** (`#aea5a2`): Placeholders, captions

### Semantic
- **Border** (`#e3d1e5`): Dividers, container borders
- **Success** (`#22c55e`): Confirmations
- **Warning** (`#f59e0b`): Caution states
- **Error** (`#ef4444`): Destructive actions

## Typography Rules

| Role | Font | Weight | Notes |
|------|------|--------|-------|
| Display | Salesforce-Sans | 300 | Hero headlines |
| Heading | Salesforce-Sans | 300 | Section titles |
| Body | Salesforce-Avant-Garde | 400 | Standard text |
| Mono | ui-monospace | 400 | Code, technical |

## Component Stylings

### Buttons
**Primary**
- Background: `#324d29`
- Text: `#ffffff`
- Padding: 7px 14px
- Radius: 13px

**Secondary**
- Background: transparent
- Text: `#324d29`
- Border: 1px solid `#e3d1e5`
- Radius: 13px

### Cards
- Background: `#696969`
- Border: 1px solid `#e3d1e5`
- Radius: 20px
- Shadow: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 10px 0px`

### Inputs
- Background: `#000000`
- Border: 1px solid `#e3d1e5`
- Radius: 13px
- Focus: 1px solid `#324d29`

## Layout Principles

### Spacing Scale
- XS: 4px, SM: 7px, MD: 14px
- LG: 21px, XL: 28px, 2XL: 42px

### Border Radius
- Small: 7px
- Medium: 13px
- Large: 20px
- Full: 9999px

### Shadows
- SM: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 0px 32px 0px`
- MD: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 10px 0px`
- LG: `rgb(97, 31, 105) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset`

## Design Decisions (from Mood Profile)

- **Subtle depth**: Moderate shadows for gentle elevation
- **Balanced shapes**: Moderate corner rounding
- **Compact layout**: Information-dense, efficient use of space
- **Light headlines**: Subtle, elegant, understated authority

## Agent Prompt Guide

### Quick Reference
- Primary: `#324d29`, Background: `#000000`
- Heading: Salesforce-Sans @ 300, Body: Salesforce-Avant-Garde @ 400
- Radius: 7px / 13px / 20px
- Spacing: 4px / 7px / 14px / 21px

### CSS Variables (ready to paste)
```css
:root {
  --color-primary: #324d29;
  --color-secondary: #89155f;
  --color-accent: #3b3b71;
  --color-bg: #000000;
  --color-surface: #696969;
  --color-text: #ffffff;
  --color-text-secondary: #d2cfd9;
  --color-text-muted: #aea5a2;
  --color-border: #e3d1e5;
  --color-success: #22c55e;
  --color-warning: #f59e0b;
  --color-error: #ef4444;
  --radius-sm: 7px;
  --radius-md: 13px;
  --radius-lg: 20px;
  --shadow-sm: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 0px 32px 0px;
  --shadow-md: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 10px 0px;
  --shadow-lg: rgb(97, 31, 105) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset;
}
```
